title: Arc
description: My personal minimal "playing" pack with some sophisticated technical tools.
body:
**This pack is likely to stay abandoned for a while, as i don't find maintaining it here as useful as i thought it would be.**

[![so](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v2/assets/cozy/built-with/simply-optimized_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)

Besides the mods from Simply Optimized, it includes:
- Client Commands  
- Command Macros  
- Flour's Various Tweaks  
- Logical Zoom  
- Mining Cooldown Fix  
- Mod Menu  
- NBT Editor  
- Slyde  
- Sodium Extra  
- Visible Barriers

This is all mostly the mods I'd use on a daily basis, mostly technical-ish utility mods and some of the absolute nessesities.
